text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuning Data Preparation — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `fine-tuning-openai-data-prep`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: extract
step.action: Pull required columns; cap to schema requirements.

step.name: schema-map
step.action: Map columns to chat (system/user/assistant) or completion (prompt/completion) or DPO (prefer/non-prefer).

step.name: validate
step.action: Run validate-jsonl.py: schema + token-count + PII scan.

step.name: split
step.action: Hash-disjoint split: 80/20 (or 70/30 if <500). Balance classes within 1.5x.
